allow: PowerShell(npx vitest run precision uia-precision merge summarize run-v2.precision 2>&1)

PowerShell(npx vitest run 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 8; "---TSC---"; npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json; "TSC EXIT: $LASTEXITCODE")
